config.bettersprint.title: Better Sprint
config.bettersprint.option.show_indicato: Display the on-screen indicator that shows whether sprint toggle is active.
config.bettersprint.option.indicator_x.d: Horizontal position of the indicator (0% = left, 100% = right).
config.bettersprint.option.indicator_y.d: Vertical position of the indicator (0% = top, 100% = bottom).
config.bettersprint.option.indicator_sca: Change the size multiplier applied to the indicator text.
config.bettersprint.option.indicator_sha: Render the indicator text with a drop shadow for better readability.
config.bettersprint.option.indicator_bac: Show a solid background behind the indicator text for better visibility.
config.bettersprint.option.indicator_bor: Show a border around the indicator background.
config.bettersprint.option.reduce_fov_ji: Reduce field-of-view jitter when transitioning between sprinting and sneaking states.
